mandate.title: HR Onboarding Automation Platform
mandate.description: A digital onboarding solution for a 50-employee French company to replace manual paper-and-Excel processes. The platform will automate document generation, e-signature workflows, task tracking, and notification systems, reducing onboarding time from 2 weeks to under 3 days while ensuring GDPR compliance.
target_users: HR manager (daily admin: workflow configuration, progress monitoring, document management)
New employees (document completion, e-signature, task completion)
core_features: Employee onboarding workflow engine with task assignment and progress tracking
Digital document generation and upload management
Google Workspace integration (SSO, email notifications, calendar)
Real-time dashboard for HR manager showing onboarding status
Audit trail for document changes and signatures
success_criteria: Onboarding completion time reduced from 14 days to <3 days
100% elimination of manual email sending and paper documents
E-signature capture within 24 hours of document send
HR manager can view real-time status without manual follow-up
New employee self-service task completion rate >90%
GDPR-compliant data storage with encryption and access controls
System handles 10 onboardings/year with zero manual spreadsheet tracking
constraints: Must integrate with existing Google Workspace infrastructure
GDPR compliance required (France-based, employee personal data)
Small team capacity: assumes single full-stack developer + designer
E-signature SaaS costs: €1k-€3k/year not included in dev budget
team_needs: E-signature API integration experience (DocuSign, HelloSign, or similar)
GDPR-compliant data architecture and security practices
UI/UX designer (part-time for admin dashboards and employee forms)

tensions.wants: Clear engineering definition of what is IN and OUT of scope
tensions.value: IN SCOPE: Digital onboarding workflow (task assignment, document generation/upload, e-signature integration, progress tracking dashboard), Google Workspace integration (auth, email notifications), employee data capture form, HR admin interface. OUT OF SCOPE: Full HRIS/payroll system, time tracking, performance management, benefits administration, applicant tracking/recruiting.

doubts.about: Document template complexity - unclear if documents are simple forms or complex contracts requiring legal review integration
E-signature provider not specified - integration complexity varies widely (DocuSign vs simple click-to-sign)

tensions.wants: Measurable technical outcomes that define success
tensions.value: Onboarding time reduced from 2 weeks to <3 days, 100% digital workflow (zero paper/manual emails), e-signature capture <24h, all employee data stored GDPR-compliant, HR manager can track status real-time, new hires complete onboarding tasks without HR chase-up.

doubts.about: Baseline metrics not quantified - 'everyone hates it' is subjective. No current NPS or satisfaction data mentioned.
Turnover reduction attribution - difficult to measure causality between onboarding tool and turnover within 6 months

tensions.wants: Technical skills required to build this
tensions.value: Full-stack developer (React/Vue + Node.js/Python), Google Workspace API integration experience, document/PDF generation, e-signature API integration (DocuSign/HelloSign/etc), GDPR-compliant data storage, basic UI/UX for admin dashboards, email notification system.

doubts.about: French language requirement implied but not stated - may need localization expertise

tensions.value: 10-14 weeks total: 2 weeks discovery/design, 6-8 weeks core development, 2 weeks testing/refinement, 1-2 weeks deployment/training. Assumes single full-stack dev + part-time designer. Fits within 3-4 month constraint.

doubts.about: Google Workspace integration complexity unknown - could add 1-2 weeks if admin approval/OAuth scopes are restricted
E-signature integration - pre-built library vs custom implementation could swing timeline by 2-3 weeks
Client availability for feedback cycles not discussed - assumes timely review within 48h per iteration

tensions.wants: Identify implied requirements not explicitly stated
tensions.value: GDPR data processing agreement required, data retention/deletion policy, user role management (HR admin vs manager vs employee views), audit trail for document changes, mobile responsiveness likely expected, existing employee data migration from spreadsheets.

doubts.about: No discussion of existing data migration - 50 employees may have historical records needing import
Multi-tenant needs unclear - single HR manager vs multiple office locations or subsidiaries
Document version control/history not mentioned but likely needed for compliance

tensions.value: €10k-€25k is feasible for MVP with 1 full-stack dev (8-12 weeks) + designer + e-signature SaaS costs. Upper range allows polish and 1-2 integrations. Lower range requires prioritization and possibly template-based UI.

doubts.about: E-signature SaaS annual costs not accounted - could consume €1k-€3k/year depending on volume
Hosting/infrastructure costs - GDPR-compliant EU hosting adds €50-€200/month
Budget includes development only or also maintenance/support? 10 hires/year suggests low ongoing support needs.

tensions.wants: Understanding of the client's sector, team size, and current tools
tensions.value: Small company (~50 employees), uses Google Workspace, HR-focused, hires ~10 people/year

tensions.wants: Concrete description of what doesn't work and its measurable cost
tensions.value: Manual onboarding process: emails sent manually, printing documents, chasing signatures, tracking in spreadsheets. Takes ~2 weeks per hire. Process is hated by everyone involved.
Budget: 10 000 € - 25 000 €, Timeline: 3-4 months, Google Workspace infrastructure in place

tensions.wants: Who uses daily and who decides
tensions.value: HR manager uses daily (sends emails, tracks process), new employees receive documents. Decision maker: directeur RH
France-based, HR documents with employee personal data, GDPR applies

tensions.wants: What success looks like in 6 months
tensions.value: Gain de temps, amélioration de qualité de travail des salariés, satisfaction des nouveaux employés et baisse du turn over

tensions.wants: Clear engineering definition of what is IN and OUT of scope

doubts.about: Document template complexity - unclear if documents are simple forms or complex contracts requiring legal review integration
E-signature provider not specified - integration complexity varies widely (DocuSign vs simple click-to-sign)

tensions.wants: Measurable technical outcomes that define success

doubts.about: Baseline metrics not quantified - 'everyone hates it' is subjective. No current NPS or satisfaction data mentioned.
Turnover reduction attribution - difficult to measure causality between onboarding tool and turnover within 6 months

tensions.wants: Technical skills required to build this

doubts.about: French language requirement implied but not stated - may need localization expertise

tensions.value: 10-14 weeks total: 2 weeks discovery/design, 6-8 weeks core development, 2 weeks testing/refinement, 1-2 weeks deployment/training. Assumes single full-stack dev + part-time designer. Fits within 3-4 month constraint.

doubts.about: Google Workspace integration complexity unknown - could add 1-2 weeks if admin approval/OAuth scopes are restricted
E-signature integration - pre-built library vs custom implementation could swing timeline by 2-3 weeks
Client availability for feedback cycles not discussed - assumes timely review within 48h per iteration
Complexity could escalate to 'high' if document workflows require conditional logic or multi-stage approvals

Multi-tenant needs unclear - single HR manager vs multiple office locations or subsidiaries

Hosting/infrastructure costs - GDPR-compliant EU hosting adds €50-€200/month
